research_basis: SLSA verification requires artifact identity and provenance/expectation checks.
Supply-chain promotion should be based on explicit, reproducible validation rather than informal claims.
Prior MetaBlooms export invariants require sidecar-bound full OS bundles with no duplicate members and required internal markers.
rules: Candidate ZIP checksum and sidecar must verify.
ZIP integrity must pass and duplicate member count must be zero.
All R0-R23 required markers must be present.
Every blocking promotion check must PASS.
Bundle inventory must include schemas, implementations, fixtures, receipts, handoffs, and stage bundles.
Promotion must emit an authority pointer with stable hash.

Promotion packet must include a blocking PASS result from PROMOTION_AUTHORITY_COHERENCE_GATE_v1 before any export can be labeled current, full_authority, bootable, baseline, promotion_locked, or latest.
